contents:
[package]
name = "tauri-plugin-mcp"
version = "0.3.1"
authors = ["Pegleg"]
description = "A Tauri plugin that enables AI agents to interact with GUIs through screenshots, DOM access, and input simulation utilizing MCP"
edition = "2024"
exclude = ["/examples", "/dist-js", "/guest-js", "/node_modules"]
links = "tauri-plugin-mcp"

[dependencies]
anyhow = "1.0"
base64 = "0.22"
parking_lot = "0.12"
serde = "1.0"
serde_json = "1.0"
thiserror = "2"
subtle = "2"

[dependencies.image]
version = "0.25"
features = ["jpeg", "png"]

[dependencies.interprocess]
version = "2.2.3"
features = ["tokio"]

[dependencies.log]
version = "0.4"
features = ["std"]

[dependencies.tauri]
version = "2.11"
features = ["unstable"]

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.0"
features = ["rt", "rt-multi-thread", "macros", "sync", "time", "net", "io-util"]

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "1"
features = ["v4"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies]
core-foundation = "0.9"
core-graphics = "0.22.3"
foreign-types-shared = "0.1"
xcap = "0.9"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies]
xcap = "0.9"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies]
win-screenshot = "4.0.5"

[features]
default = []
devtools = ["tauri/devtools"]

[build-dependencies.tauri-plugin]
version = "2.5"
features = ["build"]

[profile.dev.package."*"]
opt-level = 0
